feedback_signal: PR #483 received two unresolved provider-review findings: provider comments and reviews were capped at 100 items, and an earlier rate-limit signal could mask a later substantive review.
root_operational_failure: The optional provider-review admission path treated a bounded, precedence-ambiguous snapshot as complete evidence instead of using paginated provider connections and a deterministic substantive-evidence precedence rule.

durable_improvement.action: Paginate provider comments and reviews independently and classify substantive evidence before rate-limit or action-only signals.
durable_improvement.prevents: A required provider-review artifact is not misclassified because evidence is beyond the first page or because a stale rate-limit notice appears before a substantive review.

commands.evidence: 10 focused tests passed, including rate-limit precedence and multi-page provider fixtures.

proof.future_behavior: Optional provider-review admission remains permissive by default but fails closed when explicitly required and provider evidence cannot be observed completely.
